summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: LEFT 10x10 grayscale input image (VGroup of Squares with interpolate_color BLACK-WHITE fill) containing a vertical white stripe. TOP-RIGHT 3x3 Sobel-x kernel colored GREEN (+) / RED (-) / GREY_D (0) with MathTex values. BOTTOM-RIGHT 8x8 output grid starting grey, filled in as the YELLOW 3x3 highlight Rectangle sweeps across 8 sample positions of the input and each target output Square takes on BLUE (positive) / RED (negative) interpolate_color based on Σ kernel*patch. YELLOW caption explains vertical-edge detection.
